basic_details.job_title: PGCIL POWERGRID Non Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 660 Junior Officer Trainee, Diploma Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Diploma Trainee (Electrical) - DTE Diploma Trainee (Civil) - DTC Diploma Trainee (Survey) - DTS Junior Officer Trainee (HR) - JOT (HR) Junior Officer Trainee (F&A) - JOT (F&A) Junior Technician Trainee (Survey) - JTT (Survey)
basic_details.short_information: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has published the Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Notification 2026 in April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 660 positions (630 for POWERGRID + 30 for CTUIL). Candidates within the age range of 18 to 27 years and holding a Diploma in Engineering / Graduate Degree (BBA/BBM/BBS) / Inter CA/CMA / ITI in relevant disciplines are eligible to apply online at powergrid.in. The application process will be active from 20th April 2026 to 11th May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF an

application_fee.details: For General / OBC (NCL) / EWS: ₹300/- (for DTE/DTC/DTS/JOT posts) or ₹200/- (for JTT Survey post) For SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen: No fee (exempted)

age_limit.details: All Posts - 27 Years (Upper Age Limit as on 11-05-2026)

qualification.details: Nationality: Only Indian Nationals of age 18 years or above are eligible to apply. | Diploma Trainee Posts (DTE / DTC / DTS) | Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Posts

salary_details.diploma trainee / junior officer trainee: Pay scale Rs.24000-3%-108000/- (IDA) at S0 level with Basic Pay Rs.24,000/- + IDA, HRA and Perks @12% of Basic Pay
salary_details.on absorption (after training): Junior Engineer Gr-IV / Junior Officer Gr-IV at S1 level in pay scale Rs.25000-3%-117500/- (IDA) with annual CTC approx. Rs.12.7 Lakhs
salary_details.junior technician trainee (survey) (duri: Pay scale Rs.21000-3%-72000/- (IDA) at W2 level with Basic Pay Rs.21,000/- + IDA, HRA and Perks @12% of Basic Pay
salary_details.additional benefits (on regularization): Dearness Allowance, Perquisites & Allowance as per cafeteria approach, Performance Related Pay, Company Quarters or HRA, Reimbursement of conveyance, mobile, laptop, PF, Gratuity, Pension, Leave encashment, Group Insurance, Medical facilities, Loans & Advances etc. as per company rules
salary_details.details: Selected candidates shall undergo training for a period of one year. Pay during training & on successful completion of training is as given below.

selection_process: Written Test / Computer Based Test (CBT) - 100% weightage (170 objective questions: 120 Technical/Professional Knowledge + 50 Aptitude) Computer Skill Test (CST) (for JOT HR / F&A) - Qualifying in nature Trade Test (TT) (for JTT Survey) - Qualifying in nature

CBT Qualifying Criteria: Minimum 40% aggregate (UR/EWS) / 30% aggregate (reserved) with separate minimum in each part (for Diploma / JOT posts). For JTT: 40% (UR/EWS) / 30% (reserved). Final merit is based on CBT marks only (CST / Trade Test is only qualifying).
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through https://www.powergrid.in → Career Section.
Upload recent passport size photograph (50 KB), signature (50 KB) and all required documents in prescribed format.
Pay application fee online (if applicable) through Payment Gateway.
Candidates can edit/update application till the last date. No changes allowed after closing.
Take printout of the submitted online application for future reference.
Last date for submission of online application is 11 May 2026 (23:59 Hours).
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application. Upload legible copies of all required documents (photograph, signature, qualification certificates, caste/PwBD certificate etc.) in the prescribed size and format. Candidates working in Govt./PSU must upload NOC or undertaking at the time of application. Keep registered mobile number and email active till completion of the recruitment process. Application fee once paid will not be refunded. POWERGRID reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason. Region-specific vacancies; no inter-region transfer request allowed after joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the starting date to apply for POWERGRID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process for POWERGRID Recruitment 2026 will start from 20 April 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for POWERGRID Non-Executive posts 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 11 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in POWERGRID Non‑Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited and its subsidiary CTUIL have announced 660 vacancies – 630 + 8 backlog posts for POWERGRID and 30 posts for CTUIL for Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee and Junior Technician Trainee positions across various regions/projects.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for POWERGRID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have Graduate degree, Diploma in Engineering, or ITI in relevant disciplines depending on the post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for POWERGRID Non-Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer-Based Test (CBT), Skill/Trade Test (if applicable), and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, JOT and JTT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 27 years as on 11 May 2026 for General category candidates, with relaxations of 3 years for OBC‑NCL, 5 years for SC/ST, and 10/13/15 years for PwBD (UR/OBC‑NCL/SC‑ST), plus additional relaxation for Ex‑servicemen as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for POWERGRID Non‑Executive posts 2026?
faq.answer: Application fee is ₹300 for Diploma Trainee and Junior Officer Trainee posts and ₹200 for Junior Technician Trainee (Survey), applicable to General/OBC‑NCL/EWS candidates; SC/ST/PwBD/Ex‑servicemen are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process and CBT pattern for POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, JOT & JTT 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based primarily on a Computer Based Test (CBT) with 170 objective questions (about 120 Technical/Professional knowledge + 50 Aptitude/Reasoning/English/General Awareness), followed by Computer Skill Test for JOT and Trade Test for JTT, both qualifying in nature. Final merit is prepared only from CBT marks (for the relevant post); candidates must also clear the pre‑employment medical examination.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for POWERGRID Recruitment 2026 is CC/01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the POWERGRID Recruitment 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official notification PDF from the POWERGRID official website under the careers section.
